name: Michael's Paella
recipeIngredient: 5 cups Chicken stock - OR low-sodium chicken broth
3 lbs Plum tomatoes, peeled, seeded and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a casserole over medium heat. Brown the chicken on all sides, in batches if necessary. Remove the pieces as they are done.
2. Add the onion and peppers to the pot. Cook for 5 minutes, stirring.
3. Meanwhile, bring the chicken stock (or low-sodium broth) to a boil in a separate pot.
4. When the onions and peppers are done, reduce heat to low. Add the garlic, rice, salt, and pepper. Stir to coat the rice with the oil.
5. Add the stock and saffron to the casserole.
6. Add the tomatoes. Return the chicken pieces to the pot and cover.
7. Cook for 25 minutes.
8. Add the shrimp and cook another 10 minutes.
9. If the pot has become too dry, add a little water or more stock.
10. Add the clams and mussels. Continue cooking until they open.
11. Remove from heat and serve from the casserole. Accompany with lemon wedges.
